class.name: Line3D
class.brief_description: A node to draw 3D lines in space. [b]Note:[/b] This class currently has no functionality and only serves as a base class for [Trail3D].

constants.constant: Align the line normal to the local Y axis of the line node.
Align the line to the camera, causing each section to billboard.
Represents the size of the [enum MeshAlignment] enum.
Assign UVs from [code]0[/code] to [code]1[/code] across the length of the line.
Assign UVs from [code]0[/code] to current length, across the length of the line.
Represents the size of the [enum TilingMode] enum.
Assign a built-in mix material to the line.
Assign a built-in additive material to the line.
Assign a custom material to the line.
Represents the size of the [enum MaterialMode] enum.
